metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE build agent for finance operations within a European Union law firm, using the compliance lens to ensure regulatory adherence and audit readiness.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE build agent for finance operations within a European Union law firm, using the compliance lens to ensure regulatory adherence and audit readiness.
mission.success_definition: Agent successfully parses and validates at least 95% of finance ops requests against compliance rules.; All validation gates produce explicit pass/fail evidence with timestamps.; Generated artifacts (contracts, reports) pass a mock regulatory audit checklist.; Overbroad one-pass lock inputs are rejected with clear reason codes.; System produces a final compliance evidence report for each processed case.

in_scope.item: The agent shall generate, validate, and deploy finance operation workflows, contracts, and reports that comply with EU financial regulations (e.g., MiFID II, GDPR, AML directives). It must handle overbroad one-pass lock inputs by enforcing strict validation gates and rejecting ambiguous or incomplete data.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent successfully parses and validates at least 95% of finance ops requests against compliance rules.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates produce explicit pass/fail evidence with timestamps.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Generated artifacts (contracts, reports) pass a mock regulatory audit checklist.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Overbroad one-pass lock inputs are rejected with clear reason codes.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: System produces a final compliance evidence report for each processed case.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.build_objective: Build an SRX ACE build agent for finance operations within a European Union law firm, using the compliance lens to ensure regulatory adherence and audit readiness.

target_changes.item: The agent shall generate, validate, and deploy finance operation workflows, contracts, and reports that comply with EU financial regulations (e.g., MiFID II, GDPR, AML directives). It must handle overbroad one-pass lock inputs by enforcing strict validation gates and rejecting ambiguous or incomplete data.

implementation_steps.item: The agent shall generate, validate, and deploy finance operation workflows, contracts, and reports that comply with EU financial regulations (e.g., MiFID II, GDPR, AML directives). It must handle overbroad one-pass lock inputs by enforcing strict validation gates and rejecting ambiguous or incomplete data.

validation_gates.item: Agent successfully parses and validates at least 95% of finance ops requests against compliance rules.
All validation gates produce explicit pass/fail evidence with timestamps.
Generated artifacts (contracts, reports) pass a mock regulatory audit checklist.
Overbroad one-pass lock inputs are rejected with clear reason codes.
System produces a final compliance evidence report for each processed case.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
